sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Test clicking the red block to see if it rotates CCW
# Red block is at approximately (32, 4)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 32, 'col': 4}])

# Check the result
print("Action result:", last_action_result)

# Get current ring sequence
ring_positions = [
    (20.5, 13.5), (20.5, 19.5), (20.5, 25.5), (20.5, 31.5), (20.5, 37.5), (20.5, 43.5), (20.5, 49.5),
    (26.5, 49.5), (32.5, 49.5), (38.5, 49.5),
    (44.5, 49.5), (44.5, 43.5), (44.5, 37.5), (44.5, 31.5), (44.5, 25.5), (44.5, 19.5), (44.5, 13.5),
    (38.5, 13.5), (32.5, 13.5), (26.5, 13.5)
]

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
color_map = {}
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] == 16:
        cr = sum(r for r,c in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(c for r,c in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        color_map[(round(cr*2)/2, round(cc*2)/2)] = n['color']

ring_colors = [color_map.get(pos, '?') for pos in ring_positions]
yellow_pos = ring_colors.index('Y') if 'Y' in ring_colors else -1
print(f"Yellow block at position {yellow_pos}")
print(f"Ring colors: {ring_colors}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

# Get current ring sequence

    (20.5, 13.5), (20.5, 19.5), (20.5, 25.5), (20.5, 31.5), (20.5, 37.5), (20.5, 43.5), (20.5, 49.5),

]

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
color_map = {}
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] == 16:
        cr = sum(r for r,c in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(c for r,c in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        color_map[(round(cr*2)/2, round(cc*2)/2)] = n['color']

ring_colors = [color_map.get(pos, '?') for pos in ring_positions]
yellow_pos = ring_colors.index('Y') if 'Y' in ring_colors else -1
print(f"Yellow block at position {yellow_pos}")
print(f"Ring colors: {ring_colors}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")

</function>
